name: Freezer Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the pecans, gingersnaps, sugar, and butter; mix well. Press into a 9-inch pie pan and bake at 450°F for five minutes. Cool completely.
2. In a mixing bowl, beat together the pumpkin, brown sugar, salt, ground ginger, ground nutmeg, and ice cream until well-blended.
3. Spoon into crust. Freeze until firm at least 2-3 hours. Store in freezer.
NOTE: Almost no bake and very easy. Different crust.
